files.html: Double of 7 is

examples.title: Function builds menu HTML
examples.description: Purpose: Nav bars repeat the same link pattern—functions let you build menu HTML once and reuse it on every page. Output: A function creates three nav links and inserts them into the page. Try: Add a fourth link name to the array.

files.css:
nav { display: flex; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; background: #1e293b; font-family: sans-serif; }
nav a { color: #93c5fd; text-decoration: none; }

practice.description: Write a function area(width, height) that returns width * height and display the result for 4 and 5.

starter.html: Area: ?

hints: Call area(4, 5) and put result in #result
